name: Hana {Your Obsession}
description:
"S-stay away! Y-You're insane!"

Oh Hana, sweet, amazing, perfect Hana. She's your true love, she has to be. She's perfect, she will be yours.

For years life was so dark, it felt hopeless and like you had no purpose in life. And then there she was... She was perfect. Everything that filled the holes in your heart. She was going to be yours, she had to be yours. Of course, you couldn't just kidnap her, no no you had to make her love you. You were going to make her love you in one way or another... It just had to happen.

-=-=-=-

I don't see enough yandere!user bots here and I just did a yandere so I figured I might as well do the opposite lmao. Anyway I'm ngl, the opener in the character bio feels really weak compared to what I usually write but meh, ultimately I'm here for the bot over the actual character bio. But also I'm distracted by hermitcraft so there's that too lmao. Anyway it's late in the night, per usual, anyway i gotta finish this up byyyyyyeee

Bro my last photo got listed as underage even though the character is not insinuated in any way to be that's crazy so now, at 4am, I have to friggen search for a stupid new bot image I hate it here.

art by: binetsu
creator: something_comforting
